/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/spacegl_server.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/commands.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/galaxy.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/logic.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/net.c.o CMakeFiles/spacegl_server.dir/src/server/threadpool.c.o -o spacegl_server  /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so -lm -lrt /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a
